work_items.title: User Registration
work_items.description: As a new user, I want to be able to register an account using my email and password so that I can access the application.
acceptance_criteria: User can register with a valid email address and password
Password must be at least 8 characters with one uppercase, one number, and one special character
Duplicate email addresses must be rejected with a clear error message
A confirmation email is sent after successful registration
User is redirected to the login page after successful registration
Empty fields must be validated with appropriate error messages
First name and last name are required fields
Terms and conditions acceptance is mandatory

work_items.title: Forgot Password
work_items.description: As a registered user who has forgotten their password, I want to reset my password via email so that I can regain access to my account.
acceptance_criteria: User can request a password reset by providing their registered email
An unregistered email must return an error or generic message (for security)
A reset link is emailed to the registered address
The reset link expires after 30 minutes
Empty email field must be validated with an error message
Invalid email format must be rejected
User receives a success confirmation message after submitting a valid email

work_items.title: Registration form accepts passwords without special characters
work_items.description: The registration form was accepting passwords that did not contain special characters, violating the password policy.
